'''jazhava''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mnemonic|mnemonic]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-zh-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mnemonic|mnemonic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| jazhava
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæzhævæth|jæzhævæth]] || [[word:jæzhævæj|jæzhævæj]] || [[word:jæzhævæsh|jæzhævæsh]] || [[word:jæzhævæ|jæzhævæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jazhazhavath|jazhazhavath]] || [[word:jazhazhavaj|jazhazhavaj]] || [[word:jazhazhavash|jazhazhavash]] || [[word:jazhazhava|jazhazhava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jazhavath|jazhavath]] || [[word:jazhavaj|jazhavaj]] || [[word:jazhavash|jazhavash]] || [[word:jazhava|jazhava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jazhafvath|jazhafvath]] || [[word:jazhafvaj|jazhafvaj]] || [[word:jazhafvash|jazhafvash]] || [[word:jazhafvaf|jazhafvaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jazhavatha|jazhavatha]] || [[word:jazhavaja|jazhavaja]] || [[word:jazhavasha|jazhavasha]] || [[word:jazhavaka|jazhavaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jazhavath|jazhavath]] || [[word:jazhavaj|jazhavaj]] || [[word:jazhavash|jazhavash]] || [[word:jazhava|jazhava]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jazhavathal|jazhavathal]] || [[word:jazhavajal|jazhavajal]] || [[word:jazhavashal|jazhavashal]] || [[word:jazhavakal|jazhavakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jazhavathatha|jazhavathatha]] || [[word:jazhavajaja|jazhavajaja]] || [[word:jazhavashasha|jazhavashasha]] || [[word:jazhavaka|jazhavaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jazhavathan|jazhavathan]] || [[word:jazhavajan|jazhavajan]] || [[word:jazhavashan|jazhavashan]] || [[word:jazhavakan|jazhavakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jazhavathaoro|jazhavathaoro]] || [[word:jazhavajaoro|jazhavajaoro]] || [[word:jazhavashaoro|jazhavashaoro]] || [[word:jazhavakaoro|jazhavakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
